dimensions.literacy: Grammatical naturalness, idiomaticity, sentence variety, gloss-JP fit, lexical precision
dimensions.narrative: Beginning/middle/end, scene clarity, payoff vs. disconnected sentences
dimensions.engagement: Mood, voice, sensory detail, hooks; reader's want-to-continue pull
dimensions.integration: How gracefully reinforcement vocab/grammar is woven (vs. tacked-on tail)
dimensions.freshness: Originality of scene/image relative to the rest of the library
